enrichment.short_description: Glean is an enterprise Work AI platform that unifies company data and apps to power permission-aware search, AI agents, and automation.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Glean unifies enterprise data and apps into a Work AI platform for permission-aware search, AI agents, and automation.

features.title: Knowledge Connection
features.description: Integrates across enterprise apps and systems such as Slack, Google Drive, Jira, Confluence, SharePoint, GitHub, and Salesforce.

features.title: AI Agents
features.description: Lets teams build and deploy AI agents to automate workflows.

features.title: Permission-Aware Search
features.description: Provides enterprise search that respects each user's existing access permissions.

features.title: Workflow Automation
features.description: Automates recurring tasks and processes across departments.

features.title: Enterprise Security
features.description: Backed by SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, ISO 42001, HIPAA, and GDPR compliance with full observability.

features.title: Multi-LLM Support
features.description: Works with 35+ different large language models rather than a single provider.

pros: Connects to a wide range of enterprise systems, including Slack, Salesforce, GitHub, and SharePoint
Permission-aware search preserves each user's existing access controls
Supports 35+ LLMs instead of locking customers into one model provider
Extensive compliance certifications, including SOC 2, ISO 27001, ISO 42001, HIPAA, and GDPR
cons: No public pricing; requires a sales demo to get a quote
No published free trial or free plan
Enterprise-focused positioning may be more than smaller teams need

faqs.question: Does Glean publish its pricing?
faqs.answer: No, Glean does not list public prices; you need to request a demo for a quote.

faqs.question: What systems does Glean connect to?
faqs.answer: Glean integrates with apps such as Slack, Google Drive, Jira, Confluence, SharePoint, GitHub, and Salesforce.

faqs.question: Can teams build custom AI agents in Glean?
faqs.answer: Yes, Glean lets teams build and deploy their own AI agents for automation.

faqs.question: Is Glean secure enough for enterprise data?
faqs.answer: Yes, Glean holds SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, ISO 42001, HIPAA, and GDPR compliance.

faqs.question: How many LLMs does Glean support?
faqs.answer: Glean states it supports 35+ unique LLMs.

use_cases.title: Enterprise knowledge search
use_cases.description: Employees search across connected apps and documents with results limited to what they are permitted to see.

use_cases.title: AI agent automation
use_cases.description: Teams build AI agents on Glean to automate recurring cross-app workflows.

use_cases.title: Departmental self-serve support
use_cases.description: Support, HR, and sales teams get instant answers pulled from internal knowledge sources.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Glean?
paragraphs: Glean is a Work AI platform that connects an organization's apps and data sources so employees can search, build AI agents, and automate workflows without losing existing permission controls.
The platform integrates with tools such as Slack, Google Drive, Jira, Confluence, SharePoint, GitHub, and Salesforce, and supports more than 35 different LLMs.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Glean is for
paragraphs: Glean targets enterprise organizations that need centralized, permission-aware search and AI automation across many internal systems, including engineering, sales, support, and HR teams.

enrichment.short_description: WriterZen is an SEO content platform for keyword research, topic clustering, and GPT-4o mini-assisted writing, sold with one-time pricing.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: WriterZen offers SEO keyword research, topic clustering, and a GPT-4o mini AI writer with one-time, no-subscription pricing.

features.title: Topic Discovery
features.description: Generates clustered topics from seed keywords for content planning.

features.title: Keyword Explorer
features.description: Analyzes keyword data pulled from Google's search database.

features.title: Keyword Planner
features.description: Organizes and clusters keywords into a content strategy.

features.title: Content Creator
features.description: Builds article outlines from SERPs, Reddit, and Google Suggest results.

features.title: AI Assistant
features.description: GPT-4o mini-powered writing, rewriting, and paraphrasing tool.

features.title: Plagiarism Checker
features.description: Verifies the originality of generated and edited content.

features.title: Team Function
features.description: Manages team projects and shared content workflows.

features.title: Domain Analysis
features.description: Surfaces competitive keyword and content insights.

pros: One-time lifetime pricing with no recurring subscription fees
Combines keyword research and AI writing in a single workflow
21-day money-back guarantee on purchases
Rated 4.7-4.8/5 across G2, Trustpilot, and Capterra
cons: Credit-based system means extra keyword/NLP credits must be purchased once included credits run out
Additional team seats cost $9/seat/month on top of the one-time price
No free plan or free trial mentioned on the site

faqs.question: Is WriterZen a subscription?
faqs.answer: No, WriterZen sells one-time lifetime licenses rather than monthly subscriptions.

faqs.question: What AI model powers WriterZen's writing assistant?
faqs.answer: WriterZen's AI Assistant is powered by GPT-4o mini.

faqs.question: Can teams collaborate in WriterZen?
faqs.answer: Yes, additional member seats can be added for $9/seat/month.

faqs.question: Does WriterZen offer refunds?
faqs.answer: Yes, WriterZen offers a 21-day money-back guarantee.

use_cases.title: SEO content planning
use_cases.description: SEO teams research and cluster keywords into topics before assigning articles.

use_cases.title: Scaled content production
use_cases.description: Marketing teams generate outlines and AI-assisted drafts from SERP and keyword data.

use_cases.title: Freelance content research
use_cases.description: Solo writers use keyword and domain analysis to find content opportunities.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is WriterZen?
paragraphs: WriterZen is an SEO content workflow tool that combines keyword research, topic clustering, and AI-assisted writing so teams can plan and produce content designed to rank in Google.
It pulls keyword data from Google's search database and builds article outlines from SERPs, Reddit, and Google Suggest, with a GPT-4o mini writing assistant to draft and rewrite copy.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who WriterZen is for
paragraphs: WriterZen suits SEO professionals, agencies, and marketing teams who want keyword research and AI writing in one tool, paid for with a one-time fee instead of a recurring subscription.

enrichment.short_description: Koala AI generates SEO-optimized articles using GPT-5 and Claude models, with deep research, internal linking, and direct CMS publishing.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Koala AI writes SEO articles with GPT-5 and Claude, offering deep research, automatic internal linking, and 1-click CMS publishing.

features.title: Deep Research Mode
features.description: Analyzes far more source context to produce factual, well-cited articles.

features.title: Real-Time SERP Analysis
features.description: Examines top-ranking content to identify entities and semantic keywords.

features.title: Automatic Internal Linking
features.description: Adds contextual internal links across a site automatically.

features.title: Amazon Affiliate Articles
features.description: Generates product review articles with live pricing and specs.

features.title: 1-Click Publishing
features.description: Publishes directly to WordPress, Shopify, Webflow, and Ghost.

features.title: Polish (AI Editing)
features.description: One-click editing pass for readability and formatting.

features.title: Outline Editor
features.description: Lets users customize article structure before generation.

features.title: Bulk Content Creation
features.description: Generates multiple articles simultaneously.

pros: Direct one-click publishing to WordPress, Shopify, Webflow, and Ghost
Uses current-generation models including GPT-5 and Claude 4
Deep Research mode aims to cite sources for factual accuracy
Transparent, tiered per-word pricing
cons: Higher-volume plans get expensive, up to $2,000/month
Using premium models like GPT-5.2 or Claude 4.5 Sonnet consumes word quota at double the rate
Free trial is limited to 5,000 words and 25 chat messages

faqs.question: Does Koala AI offer a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, new users get 5,000 words and 25 chat messages free, with no credit card required.

faqs.question: Which AI models does Koala AI use?
faqs.answer: Koala AI uses GPT-5 and Claude 4 models for content generation.

faqs.question: Can Koala AI publish directly to my site?
faqs.answer: Yes, it offers 1-click publishing to WordPress, Shopify, Webflow, and Ghost.

faqs.question: What is Deep Research Mode?
faqs.answer: It analyzes significantly more source context to produce factual, well-cited articles.

use_cases.title: SEO content scaling
use_cases.description: Content teams generate large volumes of SEO-optimized articles with automatic internal linking.

use_cases.title: Amazon affiliate content
use_cases.description: Affiliate marketers generate product review articles with live pricing and specs.

use_cases.title: Agency content production
use_cases.description: Agencies bulk-generate and publish client articles directly to CMS platforms.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Koala AI?
paragraphs: Koala AI is a content creation platform that uses GPT-5 and Claude models to generate SEO-optimized, publish-ready articles, with a Deep Research mode intended to produce factual, well-cited content.
It can publish directly to WordPress, Shopify, Webflow, and Ghost, add internal links automatically, and generate Amazon affiliate product reviews with live pricing.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Koala AI is for
paragraphs: Koala AI is built for content creators, SEO professionals, publishers, and agencies who need to produce and publish large volumes of articles directly to their CMS.

name: LongShot AI
skip_reason: The official site (longshot.ai) states the product served roughly 200,000 users over 4+ years but was discontinued in mid-2025; no active product remains to research or enrich.

name: Peppertype
skip_reason: peppertype.ai now redirects (via peppercontent.io) to pepper.inc/peppertype-ai, which presents 'Pepper' as an agency-led content/SEO/GEO services brand rather than the original self-serve AI writing SaaS tool. There are no verifiable facts about a standalone Peppertype product, its features, or pricing today.

name: Content at Scale
skip_reason: contentatscale.ai permanently redirects to brandwell.ai, which is now positioned as an intent-data/GTM platform (TrafficID, ABM, intent tracking) rather than the original AI content writer. The product appears to have been rebranded/pivoted, so there are no reliable standalone facts to enrich under the 'Content at Scale' name.

name: Copysmith
skip_reason: copysmith.ai is now solely a parent-brand landing page for three separately branded products (Frase, Describely, Rytr) with no standalone Copysmith signup, pricing, or product description. The original AI copywriting tool appears discontinued/consolidated into those other products.

enrichment.short_description: Hypotenuse AI is a product experience management platform that enriches ecommerce product data and auto-generates SEO descriptions and imagery.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Hypotenuse AI enriches ecommerce product data and generates SEO descriptions, images, and translations for enterprise retailers.

features.title: Product Data Enrichment
features.description: Automatically fills in missing attributes and standardizes product data.

features.title: AI Product Descriptions
features.description: Generates SEO-optimized titles and descriptions in a brand's voice.

features.title: Product Tagging & Categorization
features.description: Applies consistent tags aligned with Google or Amazon taxonomies.

features.title: AI Image Enhancement
features.description: Standardizes images, adjusts backgrounds, and increases resolution.

features.title: Digital Asset Management
features.description: Organizes and edits product imagery in one place.

features.title: AI Product Photography
features.description: Generates product shots without a physical photoshoot.

features.title: Brand Voice Enforcement
features.description: Applies custom brand guidelines and formatting rules.

features.title: Translation & Localization
features.description: Supports multi-language product content creation.

pros: Integrates with major marketplaces (Amazon, Walmart, Target) and PIM/commerce platforms (Shopify, Salsify, NetSuite, Akeneo, BigCommerce, WooCommerce)
Y Combinator-backed with a claimed 500,000+ users
Free trial available with no credit card required
SOC 2 compliant with granular access controls
cons: No public pricing; both plans require contacting sales for a quote
Basic plan is capped at fewer than 100 products, pushing larger catalogs to custom Enterprise pricing
Enterprise-oriented positioning may not suit very small merchants

faqs.question: Does Hypotenuse AI publish its prices?
faqs.answer: No, both the Basic and Ecommerce Enterprise plans require contacting sales for a custom quote.

faqs.question: Is there a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, Hypotenuse AI offers a free trial with no credit card required.

faqs.question: What platforms does it integrate with?
faqs.answer: It integrates with marketplaces like Amazon, Walmart, and Target, and platforms like Shopify, Salsify, NetSuite, Akeneo, BigCommerce, and WooCommerce.

faqs.question: Can it generate product images?
faqs.answer: Yes, its AI Image Enhancement and AI Product Photography features can standardize, edit, and generate product imagery.

use_cases.title: Bulk product data enrichment
use_cases.description: Retailers with large catalogs fill in missing attributes and standardize product data automatically.

use_cases.title: SEO product content at scale
use_cases.description: Teams generate SEO-optimized titles and descriptions across thousands of SKUs in a consistent brand voice.

use_cases.title: Multi-marketplace listing management
use_cases.description: Brands maintain consistent tagging and categorization across Amazon, Walmart, and their own site.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Hypotenuse AI?
paragraphs: Hypotenuse AI is a product experience management (PXM) platform that enriches ecommerce product data and generates SEO-optimized descriptions, tags, and images at scale.
It integrates with marketplaces such as Amazon, Walmart, and Target, and commerce platforms like Shopify, Salsify, NetSuite, and BigCommerce, to keep product content consistent across channels.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Hypotenuse AI is for
paragraphs: The platform targets enterprise ecommerce teams and larger retailers managing large or multi-channel product catalogs, rather than small single-store merchants.

enrichment.short_description: ParagraphAI is an AI writing assistant that drafts, corrects, and translates text via a mobile keyboard, browser extension, and apps.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: ParagraphAI is an AI writing assistant with grammar fixes, replies, and translation across 40+ languages on mobile and browser.

features.title: Grammar Correction
features.description: Fixes messages instantly with single-tap corrections.

features.title: Email Replies
features.description: Drafts responses to messages with one tap.

features.title: Content Creation
features.description: Generates emails, reports, and articles.

features.title: Real-Time Editing
features.description: Adjusts formality, friendliness, length, and tone of a message.

features.title: Translation
features.description: Supports 40+ languages for input and output.

features.title: AI Humanization
features.description: Makes AI-generated content sound more natural.

features.title: Templates
features.description: Streamlines repetitive writing tasks.

features.title: Summarization
features.description: Condenses web pages and PDFs.

pros: Free plan available with no credit card required
Works across mobile keyboard, browser extension, and apps with cross-device sync
Supports 40+ languages for translation
Annual Pro billing cuts the monthly price roughly in half
cons: Free plan limited to 5 daily uses of Create/Fix/Reply/Edit and a 1,000 character input limit
Enterprise features like brand voice and dedicated support require custom/quote pricing
Monthly Pro plan ($24.99/user) costs double the annual per-month rate

faqs.question: Is there a free version of ParagraphAI?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Free plan allows 5 daily uses with a 1,000 character input limit.

faqs.question: How much does Pro cost?
faqs.answer: Pro is $24.99/user/month billed monthly, or $12.49/user/month billed annually.

faqs.question: What platforms does ParagraphAI support?
faqs.answer: It's available as a Chrome browser extension and as iOS and Android mobile apps.

faqs.question: How many languages does ParagraphAI support?
faqs.answer: It supports writing and translation in 40+ languages.

use_cases.title: Everyday writing assistance
use_cases.description: Professionals fix grammar and draft replies to emails and messages from any app.

use_cases.title: Accessible writing support
use_cases.description: Users with dyslexia or who are ESL learners get help composing clear text.
use_cases.audience: ESL learners and people with dyslexia

use_cases.title: Enterprise brand communications
use_cases.description: Enterprise teams apply a custom brand voice with dedicated account support.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is ParagraphAI?
paragraphs: ParagraphAI is an AI writing assistant that helps users draft, correct, and reply to messages from a mobile keyboard, browser extension, or app, with real-time tone and formality adjustments.
It supports 40+ languages for translation and includes summarization for web pages and PDFs, plus an AI humanization feature for AI-generated text.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who ParagraphAI is for
paragraphs: ParagraphAI targets students, professionals, ESL learners, and people with dyslexia who want writing help built into their existing keyboard and browser, with an Enterprise tier for teams needing brand voice controls.

enrichment.short_description: Simplified is an AI marketing platform where the Riley agent plans, creates, and publishes marketing campaigns across social channels.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Simplified uses its Riley AI agent to plan, create, and publish marketing campaigns with brand kits and multi-channel scheduling.

features.title: AI Agent (Riley)
features.description: Plans, creates, and publishes marketing campaigns end-to-end.

features.title: Creative Tools
features.description: AI-powered design, writing, video, ad, and presentation creation.

features.title: Brand Kit
features.description: Stores brand guidelines, voice, colors, fonts, products, and approved examples.

features.title: Approval Gates
features.description: Shows review status and ownership before content is published.

features.title: Social Management
features.description: Provides a shared calendar, inbox, and analytics across channels.

features.title: Scheduling & Publishing
features.description: Publishes natively to 10+ social and ad channels, including TikTok Ads, Meta Ads, LinkedIn, Instagram, and YouTube.

features.title: Developer Access
features.description: Offers an MCP server, CLI, API/webhooks, REST, and OAuth2 for custom integrations.

pros: Riley agent automates end-to-end campaign planning, creation, and publishing
Publishes natively to 10+ channels including TikTok Ads, Meta Ads, LinkedIn, and YouTube
Developer access via MCP server, CLI, API/webhooks, and OAuth2
Free trial of the Starter plan available with no credit card required
cons: Starter plan's monthly price ($59) is cheaper than its annual per-month price ($79), an unusual pricing structure worth double-checking before purchase
Multi-seat collaboration only becomes available starting on the Pro plan
Extra campaigns beyond a plan's monthly limit cost $10 each

faqs.question: Is there a free trial of Simplified?
faqs.answer: Yes, Simplified offers a trial with full Starter-plan access (5 campaigns, 100K AI words, 100 AI designs) with no credit card required.

faqs.question: What does the Riley AI agent do?
faqs.answer: Riley plans, creates, and publishes marketing campaigns end-to-end, adjusting output based on approvals and feedback.

faqs.question: Which channels can Simplified publish to?
faqs.answer: Simplified publishes to 10+ channels including TikTok Ads, Meta Ads, LinkedIn, Instagram, and YouTube.

faqs.question: Does Simplified offer an API?
faqs.answer: Yes, it offers an MCP server, CLI, REST API/webhooks, and OAuth2 for developers.

faqs.question: What happens if I use more campaigns than my plan allows?
faqs.answer: Additional campaigns can be purchased for $10 each on any plan.

use_cases.title: Lean team campaign automation
use_cases.description: Founders and small marketing teams let Riley plan and publish full campaigns without a large team.

use_cases.title: Agency client management
use_cases.description: Agencies manage brand kits and approvals for multiple clients from one workspace.

use_cases.title: Custom AI agent workflows
use_cases.description: Technical teams connect their own AI agents (e.g. Claude, Codex, Cursor) via Simplified's API and MCP server.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Simplified?
paragraphs: Simplified is an AI marketing platform built around Riley, an AI agent that plans, creates, and publishes marketing campaigns end-to-end using a stored brand kit and approval workflow.
It includes creative tools for design, writing, video, and ads, plus social scheduling and analytics across 10+ channels, with API, CLI, and MCP server access for developers.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Simplified is for
paragraphs: Simplified serves founders and lean marketing teams, agencies managing multiple clients, and technical teams that want to connect their own AI agents to a marketing workflow.
